raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Aāronu/ un us Eleazaru / un us
Ihtamaru winna atliffuscheem
Dehleemu/ nemuneet to Ehdamu-
Uppuri/ kas no ta KUNGA ugg-
guntin atlizzis irr/ un ehdeet to
neraudsetu pee ta Altara / jo tas
irr weena itt fwehta Swehtiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz buhs jums to
fwehtā Weetā ehst/ jo ta irr tawa
nospreesta Dalta/ un tawu Dehlu
nospreesta Dalta/no ta KUNGA
Ugguntin / jo ta irr man paweh-
lehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tahs Kustinaschanas
Kruhtis/un to PazelschanasPlez-
zin / buhs jums schihkstā Weetā
ehst / tew un taweem Dehleem/
un tawahm Meitahm ar tew / jo
ta irr tawa nospreesta Dalta / un
tawu Dehlu nospreesta Dalta /
tahs irr no Israēta Behruu Pa-
teikfchanas - Uppureem dohtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Pazelschanas Plezzu/
un to Kustinaschanas Kruhti buhs
teem pee teem Ugguns Taukeem
peenest / ka tee kustinati tohp par
Kustinaschanas-Uppuri / preeksch
ta KUNGA/tas laid irr tew/un
taweem Dehleem ar tew/par wee-
nu Likkunu muhscham / itt ka
tas KUNGS irr pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus mekleht mek-
leja ta Grehku-Uppura Ahst / un
redst tas bija fadedsis / un wiꞥsch
apskaitahs pahr Eleazaru / un
pahr Ihtamaru Aārona atliffu-
scheem Dehleem/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz juhs ne effat to
Grehku-Uppuri fwehtā Weetā
ehduschi/ jo tas irr weena itt fweh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ta Swehtiba/ un wiꞥsch
to dewis / ka jums b
Draudsisbas Noseedsibu
falihdsinadami preeksch
GA.
Redsi / winnu
irr eekfch tahs fwehtae
enests/ jums bij tas five
tā ja-ehd/ ka man tas pa
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja A
Mohsu : Redsi / schod
fawu Grehku-Uppuri /
Dedsamn - Uppuri
preeksch ta KUNGA/
Leetas irr man notikkusf
tu tad es schodeen to G
puri ehdis / arr tas ta
GAM buhtu labbi pat
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad Mohsus te
tad patifte tas winnim
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
